All-conditions warmth and durabilityIdeal for every day resort and backcountry shreddingThe MTN Surf Recycled Pants are stormproof shred pants made with a body mapped 100% recycled fabric layout that is as comfortable as your favorite jeans.​ They are lined with 100% recycled stretch polyester for a little extra warmth and offer the perfect balance of mobility, breathability and durability.

The MTN Surf Recycled Pants are stormproof shred pants made with a body mapped 100% recycled fabric layout that is as comfortable as your favorite jeans.​ They are lined with 100% recycled stretch polyester for a little extra warmth and offer the perfect balance of mobility, breathability and durability.
feature_bullets: Two zipped thigh pockets with internal phone sleeves
